whatsNew: Every Bricklayer practical assessment now includes a View building plan button.
Twelve individual practical plans provide scaled front elevations, plan views and side elevations with UK masonry hatching, dimensions and specifications.
Every Bricklayer practical task has been dimensioned to remain below the 150-brick assessment limit.
Building plans open in a phone-friendly scrolling viewer and can be downloaded as two-page portrait A4 PDFs.
English-bond practical plans include the approved learner reference image while technical views avoid unverified bond patterns.
